  • Northern Africa

Northern Africa

Northern Africa works best for travelers drawn to medinas, antiquities, coastlines, and desert-edge routes.

It is less about safari and more about history, architecture, food, and short- to medium-haul itineraries with strong aviation access.

Regional overview

Northern Africa is Africa’s volume engine for tourism, driven by Morocco, Egypt, Tunisia, and a growing wave of renewed interest in Algeria. Travelers come for cities, heritage, desert camps, Mediterranean coastlines, and food-led travel.

These countries are the clearest Northern Africa entry points for culture-forward, desert, and coast itineraries.

Use this page to

  • Compare the countries in Northern Africa that are most suitable for visitors.
  • Open a country landing page for practical travel context.
  • Jump onward into attractions, stays, and restaurants from the right country base.

Countries

Countries in Northern Africa

Every country links to its own landing page with a general overview, featured attractions, tour operators, stays, and restaurants.

Northern Africa

Morocco

Morocco remains one of Africa’s easiest culture-forward destinations, blending medinas, design hotels, mountain routes, Atlantic surf, and desert camps.

Country guide
View Details

Northern Africa

Egypt

Egypt delivers some of the world’s most iconic heritage travel, from Cairo and Giza to Nile cities and Red Sea resorts.

Country guide
View Details

Northern Africa

Tunisia

Tunisia combines Mediterranean resort ease with Roman ruins, medinas, and Sahara-edge routes at a relatively accessible price point.

Country guide
View Details

Northern Africa

Algeria

Algeria remains under-visited compared with its neighbors, but it offers major Saharan and archaeological rewards for travelers seeking a less conventional North Africa route.

Country guide
View Details

Featured attractions

High-interest attractions in Northern Africa

Morocco

Marrakech & Atlas Gateway

A flexible route of medina culture, gardens, riads, and day trips into the Atlas foothills.

★ 4.7 (1,222) From $16
Morocco
View Details

Morocco

Sahara Dunes

Desert camps, camel routes, and one of Morocco’s most iconic landscape experiences.

★ 4.6 (611) From $55
Merzouga and Erg Chebbi
View Details

Egypt

Cairo & Giza

Pyramids, museums, and Egypt’s most powerful urban heritage gateway.

★ 4.7 (1,535) From $18
Egypt
View Details

Tunisia

Tunis & Sidi Bou Said

A manageable blend of medina heritage, sea views, and easy cultural touring.

★ 4.5 (245) From $12
Tunisia
View Details

Algeria

Djanet & Tassili n’Ajjer

A saharan expedition route of rock art, desert geology, and extreme remoteness.

★ 4.8 (97) From $180
Southeastern Algeria
View Details
